title: deploy_gate
description: The deploy go/no-go verdict for a release target after preflight checks: a decision the deploy loop routes on, plus the reasoning and any blocking findings.

verdict.description: go = preflight is clean, safe to ship; no_go = a blocking finding means the deploy must not proceed.

summary.description: One crisp line stating whether the target is safe to ship and why.

blocking.description: Concrete blocking findings from preflight when verdict is no_go (e.g. 'failing tests', 'dirty working tree'). Empty when go.
